name: Dashboards
description: Dashboards: composable widget boards that assemble live views over monitors, meetings, quests, and other Core surfaces via soft HTTP loopback. Declares the out-of-process ryu-dashboards sidecar (kind:local) that owns the store + refresh loop + /api/dashboards/* surface, served to the desktop through the generic ext-proxy public_mount. Started eagerly (not lazy) so the kernel hardware device-dashboard renderer + nudge loop can reach it at boot / on a device poll before any desktop has opened Home. The dashboard_builder MCP runnable + the hardware render seam reach it over loopback via dashboards_client.
